title: raw_77_therapeutic_nanobot_l7_drug_load_v1 — L7 drug-load witness (CONSUMER-PROPOSED draft, hexa-bio → canon)
description: CONSUMER-PROPOSED draft (hexa-bio → canon). The canonical handoff JSON (canon@mk1:domains/life/therapeutic-nanobot/handoff/2026-05-28_hexa-nanobot-therapeutic-nanobot-boundary.json, raw_77_therapeutic_nanobot_l7_acceptance_v1, DECLARED v1.0.0-stub) names this schema as a placeholder; this file is hexa-bio's proposed field-set, derived from that handoff JSON's per-layer `responsibility` + `primitives` + `consumes_from_l6`. Canon adopts/edits and the file's source-of-truth becomes canon/domains/life/therapeutic-nanobot/spec/. raw_91 C3: a contract draft — boundary acknowledgment level; NO wet-lab/clinical claim; wet-lab + IP/contract review = canon cycle-30+. L7 = payload encapsulation + release kinetics; consumes_from_l6 = {work_per_cycle_kT (≡ raw_77_nanobot_actuation_v2.work_per_cycle_kT_units), vertex_decorations}.

l6_witness_ref.description: Path/ref to the consumed L6 single-machine witness (raw_77_nanobot_l6_handoff_v1).

consumed_from_l6.description: L6 fields this L7 witness consumes (per the canon handoff: work_per_cycle_kT_units, vertex_decorations).
